description: Evaluation test set for BloomBot retrieval quality. Each query has manually curated expected_ids representing bouquets from app/catalog.json that are correct matches. Used to measure precision and recall of the retrieval pipeline.

queries.query: My mom's 60th birthday, she loves purple
Something for Valentine's Day for my girlfriend
I need flowers for a funeral
My best friend is having a baby
Teacher appreciation gift for end of school year
Anniversary gift for my wife, 10 years together
Something purple and elegant
Bright and cheerful flowers to lift someone's mood
I want something dark and moody, not traditional
Minimalist modern flowers for a design-conscious friend
Something that looks like wildflowers picked from a meadow
Cheapest bouquet you have, under $50
Birthday flowers, budget around $80
I need something really big and impressive, this is a big deal
Romantic flowers under $70, no roses please
Something for a spring birthday in pastel colors
Corporate gift that looks sophisticated, not too floral
Purple flowers for Mother's Day, around $80
Something nice for a friend
I don't know what to get, just something pretty
Flowers for someone who says they don't like flowers
My grandmother passed away yesterday
Something for a teenager's birthday
I'm proposing to my partner this weekend
Flowers for a bohemian outdoor wedding
